title: Product terminology is governed domain data
summary: Public and internal nouns have definitions, owners, lifecycle, locale mappings, aliases, and replacements.
guidance: Map terms to stable concepts across copy, code, API, analytics, support, and localization; lint lifecycle violations.
do: Return a reason and replacement with every lint finding
Coordinate deprecation across every affected surface
dont: Treat an alias as automatically approved copy
Autofix when grammar makes replacement ambiguous
verification: Schema, duplicate-concept, alias-collision, lifecycle, locale, and golden-fixture tests
